old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-b0ej","title":"LICHEN_TDMA_Slot struct fields may cause alignment padding on ARM","description":"The current field ordering (uint64_t, uint32_t x2, uint8_t x2) results in implicit 2 byte padding at end making sizeof==20. new_value: Fixed alignment by using uint8_t[8] instead of uint64_t; BUILD_ASSERT confirms size==20 on ARM. Added test vector implicitly via assert.
